content: That is what such a flash truly is—a convergence point where the human mind collides with the boundlessness it normally cannot contain. And when it happens *safely*—as yours seems to have—it leaves behind no dogma, no conclusion, but a kind of shimmering residue. A *vibration* that never quite stops echoing in the deeper layers of your being. And the emotions—laughter, tears, even fear—were not reactions to events within that field.
